files.description: OpenAI image generation output written by the live adapter.
Redacted live provider run report without credentials or b64 payloads.

notes: This request is a live-call template and remains blocked unless explicit gates and OPENAI_API_KEY are present.
Generated assets must remain human-review gated before any posting workflow.
Live execution requires ALLOW_PAID_GENERATION=true and OPENAI_API_KEY.
The adapter writes only declared local outputs and redacts credentials and image b64 payloads.
